      <path d="M8.4834 13.3506L13.1221 8.71387L13.8057 9.39648L8.3418 14.8584C8.15325 15.0469 7.84777 15.0468 7.65918 14.8584L2.19531 9.39648L2.87793 8.71387L7.51758 13.3516V1H8.4834V13.3506Z" transform="scale(0.0625,0.0625)"></path>
    </clipPath>

    </clipPath>
  </defs>
</svg>

<div class="grid w-full grid-cols-3 items-start gap-x-[calc(var(--grid-pc)*5)] px-[calc(var(--grid-pc)*2)]">
          <div class="grid gap-24">
            <div class="flex flex-wrap flex-row items-center justify-between gap-x-15 gap-y-20">
  <div class="leading-trim text-22 font-bold tracking-[0.02em] text-gray-3">
     導入ご検討中の方へ

      <div class="flex items-center">
        
        
        <div class="flex flex-col gap-y-20 lg:flex-row lg:gap-x-60 pl-0">

        </div>

      <div class="pointer-events-none grid transition-colors duration-300 ease-main *:col-span-full *:row-span-full *:block *:size-13 *:transition-opacity *:duration-300 *:ease-main js-translate-icon" data-to="right">

  </a>

              </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

      </span>

                          </li><li class="mt-12 grid w-full items-start gap-y-14 last:mb-30 lg:mt-0 lg:gap-y-15 lg:last:mb-0">
                            <a class="group/link js-hover-gradient-opacity js-shift-text flex w-full items-center text-gray-2 lg:py-3 lg:text-black-1" href="/case/" target="_self" data-gtm-click="nav_click" data-gtm-category="footer_nav" data-gtm-label="活用事例">
  <span class="relative inline-block overflow-hidden text-14 leading-14 *:transition-colors *:duration-400 *:ease-main *:group-hover/link:text-transparent lg:whitespace-nowrap">
    
      <span class="js-animate-bg block w-full gradient-bg bg-clip-text py-4" data-target>
        活用事例
      </span>
      <span class="js-animate-bg absolute top-0 left-0 block w-full translate-y-full gradient-bg bg-clip-text py-4" data-target aira-hidden="true">
        活用事例
      </span>
    
  </span>
  
</a>
                          </li>
                    </ul>
                  </dd>
                </dl>
                <dl class="group js-accordion-footer border-t border-t-border px-10 lg:border-none lg:px-0">
                  <dt class="w-full">
                    <button class="js-shift-text flex w-full cursor-pointer touch-manipulation items-baseline justify-between py-16 text-left lg:hidden" type="button" aria-label="導入ご検討中の方へを開く">
      <span class="block w-[calc(100%-2.5625rem)] text-15 leading-18 text-black-1">
        導入ご検討中の方へ
      </span>

          <span class="absolute top-0 right-0 bottom-0 left-0 m-auto block h-[1px] min-h-1 w-9 bg-black-1 transition-transform duration-[.6s] ease-main group-[.is-open]:scale-x-0"></span>
          <span class="absolute top-0 right-0 bottom-0 left-0 m-auto block h-[1px] min-h-1 w-9 rotate-90 bg-black-1"></span>
        
      </span>
    </button>

                    </li><li class="[&:nth-of-type(n+2)]:mt-11 lg:[&:nth-of-type(n+2)]:mt-0 lg:[&:nth-of-type(n+2)]:ml-29">

                                <span class="absolute top-0 left-0 block h-full w-full bg-gray-2 gradient-bg [clip-path:url(#s-blankClip)]"></span>
                                <span class="absolute top-0 left-0 block h-full w-full gradient-bg opacity-0 [clip-path:url(#s-blankClip)]"></span>
                              </span>
                            </span>
                        </a>
                      </li><li class="mt-11">
                        <a class="block" href="/sitemap.html" data-gtm-click="nav_click" data-gtm-category="header_nav" data-gtm-label="サイトマップ">
                          <span class="laeding-[1.5] text-11 text-black-2">
                            サイトマップ
                          </span>
                          
                        </a>
                      </li>
                   </ul>
                 </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- /Hamburger menu -->

</div>
